<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Monthly Specials Subscription](29-monthly-specials.jpg)

For people who don't want a bouquet every week but want something memorable once a month. Each delivery is themed — peonies in May, dahlias in August, branches and amaryllis in December.

## What's in it

- Themed by season
- Larger than the weekly subscription
- Quarterly billing, three deliveries per quarter

## Care

Themed care notes per month.
